regions.name: Upper Floors
regions.description: The top three floors of a glass corporate spire, sealed for the night. Rain streaks the windows and the city glitters forty stories down.

environmentalCodes.description: A hard rain drums on the glass — cover for noise, murder on grip.

nodes.name: Rooftop Helipad
nodes.description: A wind-scoured landing pad ringed by red guide lights. A maintenance hatch drops into the building; the executive floor is one level down.

nodes.name: Executive Floor
nodes.description: Hushed carpet, dark wood, and a wall of monitors at the security desk. Corner offices flank a corridor that runs to the vault stair.

nodes.name: Server Vault
nodes.description: A cold, humming room of blade servers behind a biometric door. The data Kestrel came for lives here — if she can reach the terminal.
